---
title: "test_migrate_to_qmd_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_migrate_to_qmd_empire.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.20
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
The `test_migrate_to_qmd_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_get_checksum_valid, test_get_checksum_empty, test_get_checksum_missing. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_get_checksum_valid, test_get_checksum_empty, test_get_checksum_missing. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.tools.migrate_to_qmd](file://src.tools.migrate_to_qmd)

### Exports
- `test_get_checksum_valid`
- `test_get_checksum_empty`
- `test_get_checksum_missing`
